Did not test in poudriere since it has no build, but did test that it runs. Also tested using stage-qa and check-plist. Passes portlint.

(Also, not sure if feld wants to keep maintainership on this or not, it hasn't been updated since its introduction 4.5 years ago. If not, I'd be willing to take it.)
